markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on project progress, content strategy, and website logistics.](https://fathom.video/share/K78z1EMYHb4ahipGPm-sCy-NgaXHQrmD?tab=summary&timestamp=208.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Content Strategy Approved:** GrowthX delivered an 80+ topic calendar in Airtable, adding a "conversational insights" cluster. Cresta will review and prioritize topics by business relevance (High/Med/Low).](https://fathom.video/share/K78z1EMYHb4ahipGPm-sCy-NgaXHQrmD?tab=summary&timestamp=495.0)
  - [**Website Logistics Finalized:** New content will live in a "Guides" section using a duplicated blog template. Cresta's dev agency will add a Table of Contents (TOC) and table support by EOW next week.](https://fathom.video/share/K78z1EMYHb4ahipGPm-sCy-NgaXHQrmD?tab=summary&timestamp=1397.0)
  - [**Calibration Blog in Progress:** GrowthX is rewriting an old Cresta post ("Maximizing Contact Center Productivity") as the calibration piece. It will be sent tomorrow for review to align on voice and tone.](https://fathom.video/share/K78z1EMYHb4ahipGPm-sCy-NgaXHQrmD?tab=summary&timestamp=1122.0)
  - [**Reporting Framework Defined:** Cresta will build an opportunity-level reporting framework using UTMs. GrowthX will investigate adding UTMs to AI platforms and Cresta will pull GrowthX's Looker data into its own dashboards.](https://fathom.video/share/K78z1EMYHb4ahipGPm-sCy-NgaXHQrmD?tab=summary&timestamp=8.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy & Calendar

  - [GrowthX delivered a content calendar in Airtable with 80+ topic ideas.](https://fathom.video/share/K78z1EMYHb4ahipGPm-sCy-NgaXHQrmD?tab=summary&timestamp=495.0)
      - [**Source:** Keyword gap analysis (competitors) + manual research (audience pain points).](https://fathom.video/share/K78z1EMYHb4ahipGPm-sCy-NgaXHQrmD?tab=summary&timestamp=560.0)
      - [**Structure:** Organized into topic clusters, including a new one for "conversational insights & voice of customer."](https://fathom.video/share/K78z1EMYHb4ahipGPm-sCy-NgaXHQrmD?tab=summary&timestamp=527.0)
      - [**Prioritization:** Ideas for the top 3 vertical clusters (travel, healthcare, financial services) are included; retail/e-commerce and telecom will follow.](https://fathom.video/share/K78z1EMYHb4ahipGPm-sCy-NgaXHQrmD?tab=summary&timestamp=990.0)
  - [**Cresta Review Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/K78z1EMYHb4ahipGPm-sCy-NgaXHQrmD?tab=summary&timestamp=802.0)
      - [**Feedback:** Review topics for alignment with business goals and buyer personas.](https://fathom.video/share/K78z1EMYHb4ahipGPm-sCy-NgaXHQrmD?tab=summary&timestamp=742.0)
      - [**Prioritization:** Assign a business relevance (High/Med/Low) and provide context to help GrowthX finalize the content roadmap.](https://fathom.video/share/K78z1EMYHb4ahipGPm-sCy-NgaXHQrmD?tab=summary&timestamp=918.0)
      - [**Collaboration:** Cresta will share its internal keyword research to enrich the calendar.](https://fathom.video/share/K78z1EMYHb4ahipGPm-sCy-NgaXHQrmD?tab=summary&timestamp=597.0)

### Website Logistics & Workflow

  - [**Location:** A new "Guides" section under the "Resources" dropdown.](https://fathom.video/share/K78z1EMYHb4ahipGPm-sCy-NgaXHQrmD?tab=summary&timestamp=1397.0)
  - [**Template:** Duplicate the existing blog template, adding two features:](https://fathom.video/share/K78z1EMYHb4ahipGPm-sCy-NgaXHQrmD?tab=summary&timestamp=1419.0)
      - [**Table of Contents (TOC):** For user engagement.](https://fathom.video/share/K78z1EMYHb4ahipGPm-sCy-NgaXHQrmD?tab=summary&timestamp=1481.0)
      - [**Table Support:** To prevent publishing delays from manual HTML coding.](https://fathom.video/share/K78z1EMYHb4ahipGPm-sCy-NgaXHQrmD?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
  - [**Publishing Workflow:**](https://fathom.video/share/K78z1EMYHb4ahipGPm-sCy-NgaXHQrmD?tab=summary&timestamp=1528.0)
      - [GrowthX will stage final drafts in Webflow.](https://fathom.video/share/K78z1EMYHb4ahipGPm-sCy-NgaXHQrmD?tab=summary&timestamp=1551.0)
      - [Cresta will review the first few staged articles for accuracy.](https://fathom.video/share/K78z1EMYHb4ahipGPm-sCy-NgaXHQrmD?tab=summary&timestamp=1551.0)
      - [GrowthX will then handle direct publishing.](https://fathom.video/share/K78z1EMYHb4ahipGPm-sCy-NgaXHQrmD?tab=summary&timestamp=1551.0)
  - [**CTAs:** GrowthX requested the ability to dynamically embed CTAs (e.g., linking to product pages) for better performance.](https://fathom.video/share/K78z1EMYHb4ahipGPm-sCy-NgaXHQrmD?tab=summary&timestamp=1800.0)

### Artifacts & Onboarding

  - [**Company Context:** GrowthX will rewrite this artifact using Cresta's approved messaging frameworks to ensure accuracy.](https://fathom.video/share/K78z1EMYHb4ahipGPm-sCy-NgaXHQrmD?tab=summary&timestamp=217.0)
  - [**Feature Matrix:** GrowthX will create this artifact to verify product claims, using two inputs:](https://fathom.video/share/K78z1EMYHb4ahipGPm-sCy-NgaXHQrmD?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
      - [A 45-min product deep dive with Devon and Stu (SE).](https://fathom.video/share/K78z1EMYHb4ahipGPm-sCy-NgaXHQrmD?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
      - [Cresta's "master products and capabilities deck" (\~100 slides).](https://fathom.video/share/K78z1EMYHb4ahipGPm-sCy-NgaXHQrmD?tab=summary&timestamp=399.0)
  - [**Image Pipeline:** GrowthX's design team is waiting for curated image examples from Cresta to finalize the image pipeline.](https://fathom.video/share/K78z1EMYHb4ahipGPm-sCy-NgaXHQrmD?tab=summary&timestamp=1365.0)

### Reporting & Value Impact

  - [Cresta is building a reporting framework to measure GrowthX's value impact.](https://fathom.video/share/K78z1EMYHb4ahipGPm-sCy-NgaXHQrmD?tab=summary&timestamp=8.0)
      - [**Method 1 (UTMs):** Use UTMs to stamp opportunity sources. GrowthX will investigate adding UTMs to AI platforms.](https://fathom.video/share/K78z1EMYHb4ahipGPm-sCy-NgaXHQrmD?tab=summary&timestamp=21.0)
      - [**Method 2 (Dashboards):** Cresta will pull GrowthX's Looker data (organic/LLM traffic) into its own dashboards.](https://fathom.video/share/K78z1EMYHb4ahipGPm-sCy-NgaXHQrmD?tab=summary&timestamp=125.0)
  - [**Scrunch Access:** Cresta is still awaiting access to the Scrunch tool for prompt-level AI visibility.](https://fathom.video/share/K78z1EMYHb4ahipGPm-sCy-NgaXHQrmD?tab=summary&timestamp=165.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/K78z1EMYHb4ahipGPm-sCy-NgaXHQrmD?tab=summary&timestamp=1122.0)
      - [Send the calibration blog ("Maximizing Contact Center Productivity") to Cresta by tomorrow.](https://fathom.video/share/K78z1EMYHb4ahipGPm-sCy-NgaXHQrmD?tab=summary&timestamp=1122.0)
      - [Rewrite the "Company Context" artifact using Cresta's approved messaging.](https://fathom.video/share/K78z1EMYHb4ahipGPm-sCy-NgaXHQrmD?tab=summary&timestamp=217.0)
      - [Investigate adding UTMs to AI platforms for tracking.](https://fathom.video/share/K78z1EMYHb4ahipGPm-sCy-NgaXHQrmD?tab=summary&timestamp=21.0)
      - [Confirm with its dev team that a Webflow CMS collection will support its publishing workflow.](https://fathom.video/share/K78z1EMYHb4ahipGPm-sCy-NgaXHQrmD?tab=summary&timestamp=1596.0)
  - [**Cresta:**](https://fathom.video/share/K78z1EMYHb4ahipGPm-sCy-NgaXHQrmD?tab=summary&timestamp=1928.0)
      - [Review the content calendar in Airtable, adding business relevance (High/Med/Low) and context.](https://fathom.video/share/K78z1EMYHb4ahipGPm-sCy-NgaXHQrmD?tab=summary&timestamp=918.0)
      - [Share its internal keyword research with GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/K78z1EMYHb4ahipGPm-sCy-NgaXHQrmD?tab=summary&timestamp=597.0)
      - [Provide curated image examples to GrowthX's design team.](https://fathom.video/share/K78z1EMYHb4ahipGPm-sCy-NgaXHQrmD?tab=summary&timestamp=1365.0)
      - [Task its dev agency with creating the "Guides" template (TOC, table support) by EOW next week.](https://fathom.video/share/K78z1EMYHb4ahipGPm-sCy-NgaXHQrmD?tab=summary&timestamp=1720.0)
      - [Follow up on the request for Scrunch access.](https://fathom.video/share/K78z1EMYHb4ahipGPm-sCy-NgaXHQrmD?tab=summary&timestamp=165.0)
